title: Don Krieg Sets His Sights on the Baratie
description: On pages 14–17, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cut!? The hell do you mean cut!? How can a huge gallon like this be cut!?

dialogue.speaker: Yosaku
dialogue.text: Crap! Our ship was outside too, with Nami, Yosaku and Johnny still inside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It might be too late already!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Or this ship's gonna get dragged under!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The ship! Where's our ship!? What happened to Nami!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Tell the others that if we're truly linked by fate, we'll meet again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: took the treasure and sailed away!

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
